content: Postgres row-level isolation with an organization_id column + RLS is the standard multi-tenant SaaS pattern; Supabase makes RLS first-class and ties it to auth.uid(). Supabase offers sa-east-1 (Sao Paulo) region and encryption at rest (AES-256 on infrastructure level), relevant for LGPD. Neon comparison not directly covered in results; Supabase widely documented for multi-tenant RLS from day one.
